title: draba lasiocarpa subsp. lasiocarpa
intro: Draba lasiocarpa subsp. lasiocarpa, also known as the mountain draba or alpine whitlow grass, is a perennial plant species native to the high-altitude alpine regions of western North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Draba lasiocarpa subsp. lasiocarpa include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. The plant is often prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or salve, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments such as skin conditions and respiratory issues.
